channel.title: Error Handling on Andy Ibanez
channel.description: Recent content in Error Handling on Andy Ibanez

item.title: Error Protocol Specializations in Swift
item.description: Earlier this week I was scrolling through my Twitter feed as usual and I found this tweet that made me realize I may have been handling errors incorrectly in Swift all my life. This prompted me to research a bit more about error handling in Swift, and it turns out there’s many specialized Error protocols you can conform to, and you should probably be using them over the default Error provided by the language. All these specializations conform to Error themselves. In this article, we will explore a few specializations we can use when dealing with errors in Swift.
